/rooms/{code}/messages.description: Subcollection of messages in a room.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: A real-time sharing room identified by a 4-digit code.

createdAt.description: The time the room was first created.

lastActivity.description: The last time a message was sent or the room was accessed.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single chat message or file attachment.

text.description: The content of the message (optional if file is present).

fileUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded file.

fileName.description: The name of the uploaded file.

fileSize.description: The size of the uploaded file in bytes.

fileType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

senderId.description: The unique ID of the sender.
